import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let llen = string.len(line)
    mut j = 0
    mut found = -1
    while j < llen and found == -1
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          found = j
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found >= 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, found)
      let val = string.substring(line, found + 1, llen)
      if string.len(key) > 0
        println("#{key}:#{val}")
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
